title: Pan-Seared Pork Dumplings with French Flair
description: A delicious and savory dish that combines the tenderness of pork with the crunch of pan-seared dumplings, all wrapped up in a French-inspired flavor profile.

ingredients.name: Floral Water
ingredients.notes: such as rose or orange blossom water

instructions: Preheat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the butter and once melted, add the sliced onions and cook until translucent.
Add the ground pork and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add the dumplings to the skillet and cook until golden brown, flipping halfway through.
Sprinkle the flour over the top of the dumplings and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the floral water, salt, and pepper, and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Serve the dumplings hot, garnished with diced cucumber and additional onions if desired.
Cook to an internal temperature of 165°F for the pork.
